title: Multilateral Non-proliferation Regimes, Weapons of Mass Destruction Technologies and the War on Terrorism
summary: Testimony given by James Walsh for the Subcommittee on International Security, Proliferation and Federal Services, Committee on Government Affairs, U.S. Senate. Hearing on WMD, Februrary 12, 2002.
